We You Bunleng and Marcel Lemonde the Co Investigating Judges ofthe Extraordinary
Chambers inthe Courts ofCambodia
Notingthe Law on the establishment ofthe Extraordinary Chambers dated 27 October 2004
Noting Rule 22 ofthe Internal Rules ofthe Extraordinary Chambers
Noting thejudicial investigation initiated against
Last name KAING First name GuekEav Alias Duch Male
Born on 17 November 1942 in the village of Poeweuy Commune Peam Bang District Stoeung
Kompong Thom Province Nationality Cambodian Profession Teacher
Notingthe designation by the Defense Support Section on request ofthe above mentioned person of
Mr KAR Savuth and Mr Francois Roux as his Co lawyers dated October 15 2007
1 We accredite and recognise Mr KAR Savuth and Mr Francois Roux as the Co lawyers ofthe
above mentionedperson for aprovisional period ofone month
2 Theselawyers are authorised to assist theirclient to freelycommunicated withhim and to participate
in any investigative action
Dated the 15th day ofOctober 2007 in Phnom Penh
